MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Sep-14-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to interrogatories
Granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. The objections to interrogatories 201.5, 201.6, 206.1, and 209.2 are overruled and stricken. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $823.80 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Sep-14-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel inspection and production of documents: Granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is produce responsive documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to produce documents was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $211.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2005 Set For Trial On Feb-14-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-31-06 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 501
